import pandas as pd


def analyze_sales(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    filtered = df[df["region"] == "US"]
    filtered = filtered[filtered["amount"] > 100]
    filtered = filtered[filtered["status"] == "completed"]
    filtered = filtered[filtered["year"] == 2024]
    return filtered


def get_active_users(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    result = df[df["active"] == True]
    result = result[result["age"] >= 18]
    result = result[result["country"].isin(["US", "UK"])]
    result = result[result["subscription"] != "free"]
    return result


def filter_orders(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = df[df["order_date"] >= "2024-01-01"]
    df = df[df["total"] > 50]
    df = df[df["cancelled"] == False]
    df = df[df["items_count"] > 0]
    return df
